mapper.select: SELECT rr.*, cr.relic_name, cr.relic_code, su.real_name as applicant_name, approver_user.real_name as approver FROM repair_record rr LEFT JOIN cultural_relic cr ON rr.relic_id = cr.id LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON rr.applicant_id = su.id LEFT JOIN sys_user approver_user ON rr.approver = approver_user.username WHERE rr.id = #{id}

SELECT rr.*, cr.relic_name, cr.relic_code, su.real_name as applicant_name, approver_user.real_name as approver FROM repair_record rr LEFT JOIN cultural_relic cr ON rr.relic_id = cr.id LEFT JOIN sys_user su ON rr.applicant_id = su.id LEFT JOIN sys_user approver_user ON rr.approver = approver_user.username WHERE rr.relic_id = #{relicId} ORDER BY rr.apply_date DESC

SELECT CONCAT('REP', DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y'), LPAD(IFNULL(MAX(CAST(SUBSTRING(repair_code, 8) AS UNSIGNED)), 0) + 1, 3, '0')) FROM repair_record WHERE repair_code LIKE CONCAT('REP', DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y'), '%')
SELECT status, COUNT(*) as count FROM repair_record GROUP BY status
SELECT id, relic_code, relic_name, category_id, era, material, origin, dimensions, weight, description, status, image_path, create_time, update_time FROM cultural_relic WHERE id = #{relicId}
